bezeichnung.label: Bezeichnung *
bezeichnung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

inventarnummer.label: Inventarnummer *
inventarnummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

kategorie.label: Kategorie *
kategorie.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

zustand.label: Zustand *
zustand.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

anschaffungsdatum.label: Anschaffungsdatum
anschaffungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

standort.label: Standort *
standort.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

verantwortlich_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

verantwortlich_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

hersteller.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

modell.label: Modell / Typenbezeichnung
modell.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

seriennummer.label: Seriennummer
seriennummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

garantie_bis.label: Garantie gültig bis
garantie_bis.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

bemerkungen.label: Bemerkungen
bemerkungen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

foto.label: Foto / Dokument
foto.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a4505d80ae044946e7264ab/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
